error.capacity_details: hakenewe %d bits, ubushobozi ntarengwa kuri k=1 ni %d bits
error.empty_coefficients: agace k'ibipimo (coefficient slice) ntigashobora kuba ubusa
error.insufficient_capacity: ubutumwa bunini cyane ku buryo ubushobozi bwa coefficient buhari
error.insufficient_coefficients: coefficients zidahagije mu gihe cyo gushyiramo: hakenewe %d, nabonye %d
error.insufficient_header_coefficients: coefficients zidahagije zo gushyiramo umutwe: hakenewe bits 32, habonetse coefficients %d gusa zikoreshwa
error.invalid_k_parameter: parametero k igomba kuba hagati ya 1 na 8
error.matrix_encode_failed: Guhindura inyuguti byananiwe kuri kode word: %v
error.message_too_large: Ingano y'ubutumwa irenze urugero rwemewe (8,388,607 bytes)
error.nil_random_source: isoko ritunguranye ntirishobora kuba ntaho rihuriye n'inyandiko: koresha InitializePRNG (ijambo ry'ibanga) cyangwa utange RandomSource yashyizwemo mbere
